title: OpenCost + Aitra Meter — Cost per namespace
description: Side-by-side: GPU-hour cost (OpenCost), token cost (Aitra Meter), and derived GPU spend per token, per namespace. The gap between these views surfaces serving efficiency differences that neither tool sees alone.

panels.title: GPU-hour cost per namespace (OpenCost)
panels.description: Source: OpenCost. Cost per namespace based on GPU-hour allocation.

panels.title: Token cost per namespace — $/M tokens (Aitra Meter)
panels.description: Source: Aitra Meter. Cost per namespace based on output token volume.

panels.title: GPU spend per token — derived (OpenCost ÷ Aitra Meter)
panels.description: Derived: hourly GPU spend (OpenCost) divided by hourly token throughput (Aitra Meter). Requires the aitra:opencost_cost_per_token_ratio recording rule from examples/alerting-rules.yaml. A high ratio with low GPU-hour cost signals cheap hardware serving inefficiently.
